tools.name: apko
tools.description: apko — builds single-layer OCI images from apk packages (Chainguard); auto-generates an SPDX SBOM per build.

tools.name: argo-workflows
tools.description: Argo Workflows — Kubernetes-native workflow engine (CNCF).

tools.name: aws
tools.description: The cilock aws attestor fetches the EC2 instance identity document from IMDS, verifies its RSA-SHA256 signature against the AWS region certificate, and signs the verified host identity into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: aws-codebuild
tools.description: The cilock aws-codebuild attestor captures CodeBuild build identity from CODEBUILD_* env vars and the BatchGetBuilds API, signing the full build context into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: aws-guardduty
tools.description: AWS GuardDuty — threat detection findings (CloudTrail/VPC/DNS log analysis).

tools.name: aws-iam-credential-report
tools.description: AWS IAM credential report — per-user MFA + key-rotation + password-age posture.

tools.name: aws-inspector
tools.description: AWS Inspector v2 — vulnerability + network reachability findings for EC2/ECR/Lambda.

tools.name: aws-macie
tools.description: AWS Macie — automated S3 sensitive-data discovery.

tools.name: aws-secrets-manager
tools.description: AWS Secrets Manager via aws-cli.

tools.name: aws-security-hub
tools.description: AWS Security Hub — central security findings aggregator across AWS services.

tools.name: azure-activity-log
tools.description: Azure Activity Log / Monitor logs.

tools.name: azure-devops
tools.description: Azure DevOps Pipelines — Microsoft CI/CD context.

tools.name: azure-iid
tools.description: Azure VM IMDS — instance metadata + attested identity document.

tools.name: bandit
tools.description: Bandit — Python static security analyzer (PyCQA).

tools.name: bitbucket-pipelines
tools.description: Bitbucket Pipelines — Atlassian CI/CD context.

tools.name: bom
tools.description: Kubernetes SIGs `bom` — SBOM tool for Kubernetes releases (SPDX).

tools.name: buildkite
tools.description: Buildkite CI/CD context.

tools.name: cargo-audit
tools.description: cargo-audit — Rust dependency vulnerability scanner.

tools.name: cargo-build
tools.description: cargo build — Rust build orchestrator.

tools.name: cdxgen
tools.description: CycloneDX SBOM generator (cdxgen) — multi-language SBOM tool from OWASP.

tools.name: checkov
tools.description: Scan Terraform, CloudFormation, Kubernetes, Helm, and other IaC with Checkov under cilock — every misconfig becomes a signed v0.3 SARIF attestation.

tools.name: circleci
tools.description: CircleCI CI/CD context.

tools.name: cloudbuild-gcp
tools.description: Google Cloud Build — GCP managed CI.

tools.name: cloudtrail
tools.description: AWS CloudTrail — AWS account audit log.

tools.name: codebuild-aws
tools.description: AWS CodeBuild context.

tools.name: codeql
tools.description: Run GitHub CodeQL under cilock — the SARIF report from `codeql database analyze` becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor, with the literal codeql argv captured in command-run/v0.1.

tools.name: command-run
tools.description: The cilock command-run attestor records the executed argv, exit code, captured stdout/stderr, and an optional Linux ptrace forensic record, signed into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: command-run-v0.1
tools.description: (no detector.yaml; user-driven or always-on)

tools.name: configuration
tools.description: The cilock configuration attestor captures the raw CLI flags and working directory that drove a run, signing them into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: conftest
tools.description: Conftest — Rego/OPA policy testing for structured config.

tools.name: cosign-sign
tools.description: Sigstore cosign — container/artifact signing (validated via cosign sign-blob with a local ED25519 key).

tools.name: cosign-verify
tools.description: Sigstore cosign verification.

tools.name: detect-secrets
tools.description: detect-secrets — Yelp's pre-commit secret scanner.

tools.name: docker
tools.description: The cilock docker attestor parses docker buildx --metadata-file JSON from products and records image digests, references, and per-architecture SLSA materials into signed in-toto evidence.

tools.name: drone-ci
tools.description: Drone — open-source container-native CI.

tools.name: environment
tools.description: The cilock environment attestor captures the host OS, hostname, username, and full process environment with sensitive values obfuscated, signing them into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: gcp-audit-log
tools.description: Google Cloud Audit Logs (Cloud Logging).

tools.name: gcp-iit
tools.description: The cilock gcp-iit attestor captures the GCE Instance Identity Token, verifies its signature against Google's JWKS, and signs the resulting GCE host identity into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: git
tools.description: The cilock git attestor captures the repository state at the working directory — HEAD commit, identities, refs, remotes, tags, parents, tree hash, and dirtiness — signed into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: github
tools.description: The cilock github attestor fetches the GitHub Actions OIDC token, verifies it against the GitHub JWKS, and signs the decoded claims plus workflow context into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: github-action
tools.description: The cilock github-action attestor captures GitHub Action execution metadata — reference, type, inputs/outputs, exit code, and runtime context — signed into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: github-review
tools.description: Snapshots GitHub PR review state for the current commit (or an explicit SHA/PR) via the GitHub REST API (token: GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN, or `gh auth token` fallback).

tools.name: githubwebhook
tools.description: The cilock githubwebhook attestor verifies a GitHub webhook payload's HMAC-SHA256 signature and signs the parsed payload and event name into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: gitlab
tools.description: The cilock gitlab attestor captures GitLab CI job context plus the GitLab-issued OIDC JWT and signs it into in-toto evidence, proving an attestation came from a specific pipeline, job, and project.

tools.name: gitleaks
tools.description: Gitleaks — secret detection in git history and source.

tools.name: go-build
tools.description: go build — Go compiler. Output binaries carry BuildInfo (module + VCS metadata) which the go-build attestor extracts and writes as a JSON sidecar so the evidence survives strip(1).

tools.name: go-test
tools.description: go test — Go test runner.

tools.name: gosec
tools.description: Run gosec Go SAST under cilock — flags insecure patterns (weak crypto, math/rand, command injection) and emits a signed v0.3 SARIF attestation linked to the commit that produced the code.

tools.name: govulncheck
tools.description: Scan Go modules for vulnerabilities with reachability via govulncheck under cilock — the SARIF report becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor.

tools.name: gpg-sign
tools.description: GnuPG signing — long-form artifact signature.

tools.name: gradle
tools.description: Gradle — JVM build tool (Java/Kotlin/Groovy/Android).

tools.name: grype
tools.description: Scan images or directories for vulnerabilities with Grype under cilock — the SARIF report becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor, byte-identical to what Grype produced.

tools.name: hadolint
tools.description: Lint Dockerfiles with Hadolint under cilock — pinned base images, package install hygiene, USER root checks, and 100+ other rules become a signed v0.3 SARIF attestation.

tools.name: helm-install
tools.description: helm install / upgrade — Kubernetes chart deployment.

tools.name: huggingface-hub
tools.description: HuggingFace Hub CLI (`hf`) — model card + repo management. Validated by generating a HuggingFace-standard ModelCard README.md and attesting it as a material.

tools.name: inclusion-proof
tools.description: The cilock inclusion-proof attestor binds a single file's digest to a Merkle tree root via an RFC 6962 audit path and signs it into in-toto evidence for downstream per-file verification.

tools.name: inspec
tools.description: Run Chef InSpec (Progress) compliance profiles under cilock — every CIS, custom Ruby, or dev-sec.io scan becomes a signed v0.1 InSpec attestation linked to the profile and target it scanned.

tools.name: jenkins
tools.description: The cilock jenkins attestor captures Jenkins build metadata from JENKINS_/BUILD_ environment variables and signs it into in-toto evidence, binding an artifact to the pipeline run that produced it.

tools.name: jest
tools.description: Jest — JavaScript test runner (Meta).

tools.name: jwt
tools.description: The cilock jwt attestor parses a JWT, fetches a JWKS, verifies the token signature, and signs the decoded claims plus the verifying key into in-toto evidence as a generic OIDC identity proof.

tools.name: k8smanifest
tools.description: The cilock k8smanifest attestor walks YAML/JSON Kubernetes manifests, strips ephemeral fields, records per-document digests and container image references, and signs them into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: kics
tools.description: KICS — Checkmarx IaC security scanner.

tools.name: kube-bench
tools.description: The cilock kube-bench attestor ingests an Aqua Security kube-bench CIS Kubernetes Benchmark JSON report from the step's products and signs a per-check pass/fail/warn summary into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: kubeaudit
tools.description: kubeaudit — K8s security auditor (Shopify).

tools.name: kubectl-audit
tools.description: kubectl get audit/events — Kubernetes API audit access.

tools.name: kubescape
tools.description: Scan Kubernetes manifests or a live cluster snapshot for NSA/CISA, MITRE, and ArmoBest framework violations with Kubescape under cilock — emits a signed v0.3 SARIF attestation.

tools.name: kustomize-build
tools.description: kustomize build — declarative K8s manifest customization.

tools.name: kyverno
tools.description: Kyverno — Kubernetes policy management (CNCF).

tools.name: link
tools.description: The cilock link attestor synthesizes an in-toto Link v0.3 predicate from the step's command-run, material, product, and environment attestors and signs it into in-toto evidence for legacy verifiers.

tools.name: linkerd-check
tools.description: Capture Linkerd service-mesh state under cilock — the native linkerd-check attestor parses `linkerd check -o json` plus optional `linkerd viz edges -o json` into a signed v0.3 attestation with per-category check rollup and per-edge mTLS booleans, gated by Rego for release-time mTLS enforcement.

tools.name: lockfiles
tools.description: The cilock lockfiles attestor captures the contents and SHA-256 digest of common package-manager lockfiles in the working tree and signs them into in-toto evidence as a pinned-dependency fingerprint.

tools.name: malcontent
tools.description: malcontent (`mal`) — flags supply-chain-attack capabilities and behaviors in binaries and source (Chainguard).

tools.name: material
tools.description: The cilock material attestor snapshots the working directory before a step runs and emits a single RFC 6962 Merkle-root in-toto subject (tree:materials) over every input file's digest.

tools.name: material-v0.1
tools.description: The legacy v0.1 material wire format — a flat path→digest map of every input file. Verify-only today; current builds emit material v0.3. Documented for reading pre-cutover attestations.

tools.name: maven
tools.description: The cilock maven attestor parses a Maven pom.xml and signs the project coordinates and declared dependencies into in-toto evidence as a static, pre-build dependency record.

tools.name: maven-build
tools.description: Apache Maven `mvn` — JVM dependency + build orchestrator (catalog-only; the maven attestor plugin emits the actual SLSA-style record).

tools.name: melange
tools.description: melange — builds apk packages from declarative YAML pipelines (Chainguard); emits an SBOM per package.

tools.name: nancy
tools.description: Nancy — Sonatype's OSS Index vulnerability scanner for Go modules.

tools.name: notary-v2
tools.description: notation (Notary v2) — OCI artifact signing.

tools.name: npm-audit
tools.description: npm audit — Node.js dependency vulnerability scanner.

tools.name: npm-install
tools.description: npm install / npm ci — Node.js dependency resolution + install.

tools.name: nuclei
tools.description: Run ProjectDiscovery Nuclei under cilock — the SARIF report it emits via -sarif-export becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor; supports any of Nuclei's ~13,000 community templates.

tools.name: oci
tools.description: The cilock oci attestor ingests an OCI/Docker image saved as a tarball product and signs the manifest, image ID, layer diffIDs, and repo tags into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: omnitrail
tools.description: The cilock omnitrail attestor captures a content-addressed trail of every file and directory under the working directory with POSIX metadata, signed into in-toto evidence for cross-tool provenance correlation.

tools.name: oscap
tools.description: Run OpenSCAP (oscap) XCCDF baseline scans under cilock — every SCAP Security Guide profile evaluation becomes a signed in-toto envelope carrying parsed pass/fail/N/A counts plus the raw XCCDF results XML.

tools.name: osv-scanner
tools.description: Scan lockfiles or containers against the OpenSSF OSV vulnerability database with OSV-Scanner under cilock — each match becomes a signed v0.3 SARIF attestation.

tools.name: pip-audit
tools.description: pip-audit — Python dependency vulnerability scanner from PyPA.

tools.name: pip-install
tools.description: The cilock pip-install attestor captures the post-build Python package environment via pip, statically analyzes installed code and PyPI PEP 740 provenance, and signs it into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: platform
tools.description: (no detector.yaml; user-driven or always-on)

tools.name: pnpm-install
tools.description: pnpm install — fast disk-efficient Node.js package manager.

tools.name: polaris
tools.description: Polaris — Fairwinds Kubernetes best-practices validator.

tools.name: policyverify
tools.description: The cilock policyverify attestor emits a SLSA Verification Summary Attestation recording the outcome of a cilock verify run against a signed policy, signed into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: product
tools.description: The cilock product attestor snapshots the working directory after a step runs and emits a single RFC 6962 Merkle-root in-toto subject (tree:products) over every output file's digest.

tools.name: product-v0.1
tools.description: The legacy v0.1 product wire format — a flat path→Product map with per-file MIME and digest, one file subject each. Verify-only today; current builds emit product v0.3.

tools.name: product-v0.2
tools.description: The legacy v0.2 product wire format — same per-file map as v0.1 but a single tree:products subject via a hand-rolled hash chain. Verify-only today; current builds emit product v0.3.

tools.name: protoc
tools.description: Protocol Buffers compiler — generates Go/Java/Python/JS bindings from .proto files. Common in monorepos with API codegen pipelines.

tools.name: prowler
tools.description: Scan AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, and Microsoft 365 against CIS, NIST, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS with Prowler under cilock — findings become a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the native prowler attestor.

tools.name: pytest
tools.description: pytest — Python test runner.

tools.name: retire-js
tools.description: RetireJS — JavaScript library vulnerability scanner.

tools.name: safety
tools.description: Safety — Python dependency vulnerability scanner (PyUp).

tools.name: sarif
tools.description: The cilock sarif attestor captures a SARIF result file emitted by a code scanner (CodeQL, Semgrep, gosec, Trivy) and embeds it byte-identical in a signed in-toto attestation under a .report field.

tools.name: sbom
tools.description: The cilock sbom attestor picks up SPDX-JSON or CycloneDX-JSON files from the product set, stores each document byte-preservingly, and signs it into in-toto evidence under the SBOM's native predicate type.

tools.name: scubagoggles
tools.description: Capture a Google Workspace tenant's raw configuration with CISA ScubaGoggles under cilock — the provider settings become a signed scubagoggles/v0.1 attestation that your own Rego policy evaluates. Facts in the evidence, verdict in the policy.

tools.name: secretscan
tools.description: The cilock secretscan attestor runs a Gitleaks pattern scan over every product and prior attestor's JSON, with recursive decoding, recording redacted findings into signed in-toto evidence.

tools.name: semgrep
tools.description: Run Semgrep SAST under cilock — the SARIF report becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor; supports any of Semgrep's bundled rulesets or custom rules.

tools.name: slsa
tools.description: The cilock slsa attestor assembles a SLSA Provenance v1.0 predicate from sibling attestors in the same collection and signs it into in-toto evidence under the slsa.dev predicate type.

tools.name: slsa-provenance-v1
tools.description: (no detector.yaml; user-driven or always-on)

tools.name: staticcheck
tools.description: staticcheck — Go static analyzer (Honnef.co/go/tools).

tools.name: steampipe
tools.description: Query AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, GitHub, and other cloud or SaaS APIs as SQL with Steampipe under cilock — every row becomes a signed v0.1 Steampipe attestation chained to subject digests per identity axis.

tools.name: syft
tools.description: Generate signed CycloneDX or SPDX SBOMs with cilock — Anchore's Syft runs under `cilock run` so the SBOM is captured as a real v0.3 product, hashed into a Merkle tree, and parsed by the `sbom` attestor.

tools.name: system-packages
tools.description: The cilock system-packages attestor records the build host's installed OS package inventory (name and version) before materials are gathered, signing it into in-toto evidence.

tools.name: teamcity
tools.description: JetBrains TeamCity CI/CD context.

tools.name: tekton-pipelines
tools.description: Tekton Pipelines — Kubernetes-native CI/CD (CDF).

tools.name: terrascan
tools.description: Terrascan — multi-IaC scanner (Terraform/K8s/Helm/ARM).

tools.name: test-results
tools.description: Captures JUnit XML test reports and CTRF JSON reports produced by test runners (go test -junit, pytest, jest, gradle, surefire, etc.).

tools.name: testssl
tools.description: Run testssl.sh TLS connection scans under cilock — the testssl JSON output becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor, capturing protocol negotiation, cipher matrix, named TLS vulnerabilities, and FIPS 140-2/140-3 compliance findings.

tools.name: tflint
tools.description: TFLint — Terraform linter for syntax + provider correctness.

tools.name: tfsec
tools.description: tfsec — Terraform-specific static analysis (Aqua Security).

tools.name: travis-ci
tools.description: Travis CI context.

tools.name: trivy
tools.description: Scan containers, IaC, secrets, and licenses with Trivy under cilock — the SARIF report becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor.

tools.name: trufflehog
tools.description: TruffleHog — secret + credential scanner (Truffle Security).

tools.name: vault-cli
tools.description: HashiCorp Vault CLI — secret distribution / dynamic credentials.

tools.name: vex
tools.description: The cilock vex attestor captures an OpenVEX document found among a step's product files and attaches it as in-toto evidence under the canonical OpenVEX predicate type URI.

tools.name: vexctl
tools.description: vexctl — OpenVEX statement generation.

tools.name: yarn-audit
tools.description: yarn audit — Yarn dependency vulnerability scanner.

tools.name: yarn-install
tools.description: yarn install — Yarn package manager install.

tools.name: zap
tools.description: Run OWASP ZAP DAST scans under cilock — the SARIF report from ZAP's automation framework becomes a signed v0.3 attestation parsed by the rookery sarif attestor, with the literal docker argv captured in command-run/v0.1.
